title: Lumu's Disc collection
description: This datapack adds 107 new music discs, most of them from popular franchises, memes, iconic soundtracks, and some made by my own
body:
v1.0 of this datapack adds 107 discs from your favourite franchises, most of them focused on orchestral/ambient music.

_**This data pack requires a resourcepack in order to be able to distinguish the discs.The RP can be found on the version tab, just click release 1.0**_

Special thanks to link2_thepast for making a tool that made this so much faster to make:[https://www.youtube.com/@link2thepast](https://www.youtube.com/@link2thepast)

# How to use

The way to obtain the dics, is the vanilla way, make a skeleton kill a creeper. All discs have the same drop chance.

Or use: /function lumus_disc_collection_dp:give_all_discs

_(make sure you are not in creative, because half of them will drop to the ground and disappear if picked up in creative)_

You can also play songs with command blocks through the command /playsound 

## Franchises

**v1.0 Includes tracks from the following franchises:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- -Star Wars
- -The Lord of the Rings
- -The Hobbit
- -Elden Ring
- -Skyrim
- -Dark Souls
- -Bloodborne
- -Celeste
- -Zelda
- -Halo
- -The Binding of Issac
- -One Piece
- -Terraria
- -Warframe
- -Ghost Reacon Wildlands
- -Dark
- -Smash Bros Brawl
- -Pokemon
- -Dune
- -Harry Potter
- -Pirates of the Caribbean
- -Interestellar
- -Bladerunner 2049

**_And a variety of Meme songs that go all the way back to 2006_**

</details>
